hooks.command: powershell -Command "& 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\postgres.exe' -D 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\data' > nul 2>&1 &; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host 'PostgreSQL 18 started'"

bash -c '
set -e
echo "Checking Phase 1 deployment status..."

# Check if main branch has Phase 1 changes
if ! git rev-parse --verify main &>/dev/null; then
  echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠️  No main branch found. Phase 1 progress: Cannot verify deployment.\"}"
  exit 0
fi

# List of dead code files that should be deleted in Phase 1
DEAD_CODE_FILES=(
  "loaders/load_signal_quality_scores.py"
  "loaders/load_options_chains.py"
  "loaders/load_fred_economic_data.py"
  "loaders/load_aaii_sentiment.py"
  "loaders/load_balance_sheet.py"
  "loaders/load_cash_flow.py"
  "loaders/load_income_statement.py"
  "loaders/load_analyst_sentiment_analysis.py"
  "loaders/load_analyst_upgrade_downgrade.py"
)

# Check if dead code files are deleted in main
DEAD_CODE_DELETED=0
for file in "${DEAD_CODE_FILES[@]}"; do
  if git show main:"$file" &>/dev/null 2>&1; then
    DEAD_CODE_DELETED=$((DEAD_CODE_DELETED + 1))
  fi
done

# Check if terraform resource right-sizing is in main
TF_RESOURCE_FIXES=$(git show main:terraform/modules/loaders/main.tf 2>/dev/null | grep -c '"algo_metrics_daily".*timeout.*1800' || echo 0)

if [ "$DEAD_CODE_DELETED" -eq 0 ] && [ "$TF_RESOURCE_FIXES" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"✅ Phase 1 COMPLETE: Dead code removed + terraform right-sized. Ready for Phase 2.\"}"
  exit 0
else
  REMAINING=$((9 - DEAD_CODE_DELETED))
  echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⏳ Phase 1 IN PROGRESS: $DEAD_CODE_DELETED/9 dead code files deleted, terraform updates: $TF_RESOURCE_FIXES. Remaining: $REMAINING files to remove.\"}"
  exit 0
fi
'
